name: Catch The Beaukes
short_description: In Catch The Beaukes, Beaukes (spheres) fall from the sky, and you need to collect them to earn money. Then you can upgrade things so you earn even more!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Beaukes!

In Catch The Beaukes, Beaukes (spheres) fall from the sky, and you need to collect them to earn money. Then you can upgrade things so you earn even more!

You can also complete quests, which give you money too.

And rebirthing, which resets your progress, makes it quicker to earn and unlocks new lands and upgrades. You can rebirth at a specific level based on how many rebirths you have.

There are 6 lands:

  • Grass Land

  • Wall Land

  • Desert Land

  • Water Land

  • Horror Land

  • Castle Land
